data.body:
AC amendment: ticket-lib.sh path resolution — harvest-worktree.sh already defines SCRIPT_DIR via BASH_SOURCE. Use this to locate ticket-lib.sh: source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/ticket-lib.sh". Do NOT use _PLUGIN_ROOT (not defined in this script). Add acceptance criterion:
- [ ] ticket-lib.sh sourced via "${SCRIPT_DIR}/ticket-lib.sh" (not a hardcoded path)
  Verify: grep -q 'SCRIPT_DIR.*ticket-lib.sh\|ticket-lib.sh.*SCRIPT_DIR' plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh
